name: SAIKO INU
description: Saiko Inu (SAIKO) is a Japanese-inspired meme token deployed on the Ethereum blockchain (ERC-20). The project centers on a “dog-eat-dog” theme and uses narrative/lore, community channels (X and Telegram), and a public “Bounty Board” style tracker that highlights meme-coin market rankings and targets. SAIKO is designed as a community-driven meme asset with on-chain trading available via decentralized exchanges such as Uniswap, with reference links provided to common explorers and analytics tools (e.g., Etherscan, DEXTools, DexScreener, and GeckoTerminal).
